headline: Assessing Fastenal (FAST) Valuation As Recent Share Gains Contrast With Softer Short Term Returns
summary: Fastenal stock snapshot and recent performance Fastenal (FAST) has drawn investor attention following its recent share performance, with the stock up about 1% on the day but down over the past week, month, and past 3 months. Over the past year, Fastenal’s total return is about 11%, with year to date performance near 8%. Longer term, 3 year and 5 year total returns sit well above 70%, reflecting a substantial multiyear move. See our latest analysis for Fastenal. At a share price of $43.77,...
